titleStmt.title: SII 31.131: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 131. (A.R. No. B 211 of 1938.) CHIḌIPIRĀLA, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: East wall of the Pārvati temple, in the Agastyēśvarasvāmi temple complex.
It is dated Śaka 1515, Khara, Chaitra śu. 15, Friday. Irregular.

It registers the gift of a few villages namely Chaḍipirāla, Yarraguḍipāḍu and other two villages by four individuals Nāgireḍḍi, son of Kūtāri Veṅkatayya, Nalayallaya, son of Pāpa Timmaya, Koṇḍaya, son of Balabhadraya and Veṅkaṭayya, son of Vanam Tirumalayya for the annual festivals (Tiruṇālu) in the month of Jyēshṭha. Jointly (ēkastulai) while rājādhirāja, rājaparamēśvara Śrī Viraprātāpa Śrī Veṁkaṭarāya (Venkaṭapati I) was ruling the country from the capital Penugoṇḍa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīAgastēsva(śva)rāyanamaḥ . svastiśrī . jā(ja)yādbu(bhyu)daya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu
1515 Agunēṭi khara saṁvacca(tsa)ra caItra(caitra) śu 15 śulu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapara
mēsva(śva)ra śrīvīrapratāpa śrīveṁkaṭarāyaluṁkā(gā)ru penugoṁ
ḍḍapaṭṭaṇamaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhivīsāṁmrāja(jyaṁ) sēyu cu
puṁḍaṁgānu cadipirāḷa Agastīsva(śva)runiki kūtariveṁkaṭayyakomāruṁḍu
nāgireḍḍinni pāpatimmaya komāruṁḍu nalayallaya balabhadraya
komāruṁḍu koṁḍaya vanaṁtirumalayya komāruṁḍu veṁkaṭayya Ājanḷannu yēkastu(sdhu)lai Ā(A)gastīsva(śva)ra
liṁgāsaku savinayabhayabhaktininni daṁḍaṁpeṭi samarppiṁci Iccina dharmaśāsanaṁ dēvuniki jēṣṭha
māsa A tiruṇālaku ce(ca)dipirē(rā)la grāmāna si A yiccitimi . cadipirē(rā)la yaraguḍipāḍu
palle gollapalle malanu māku yicci vāriki pu
ṇyamugānu mīku [yicca(ṣṭa)taraṁ]
samarpistimi . yi(Ī)dharmmānaku ya
vvaru tappinānu gaṁgāgarbhi tuṁ
ḍu gōbrāṁhmala vadhiṁcina pāpāna
pōvuvāru . tamatalli taṁḍrula va
dhiṁcina pāpāna pōpuvāru
tappinavāru . yiṭani voppi
ṁcina dharmma śāsanaṁ gaḍa na
vēśinaḍa paradēśāna kaṁveli
dēvēṁdra vuṁni dra vva
tauṁ ba
Digital edition of SII 31.131 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
